choices.text: Procore (industry leader), Autodesk Construction Cloud, PlanGrid, Buildertrend (residential), e-Builder (gov). Mobile-first; drawings/RFIs/submittals/pay apps. 14-20% productivity gains typical.
Navisworks runs automated checks: HVAC ducts vs beams, plumbing through columns, doors hitting walls. Catch BEFORE built. Major BIM value driver — saves rework costs.
Capacity + safety record (EMR/TRIR) + financial stability + references + schedule history + pricing. Lowest bid not always best. Prequalification critical for non-public projects.
Pay on time per contract. Release retention promptly at substantial completion. Late payment most common cause of sub leaves. Schedule + budget disaster when subs walk.

questions.explanation: Pay on time; release retention promptly.

choices.text: PE → PM → Senior PM → Director path; rotate field + office; PMP + CCM + LEED + OSHA 30 certifications; specialize (healthcare, data centers, civil); salary $60k entry to $300k+ exec. Growth: infrastructure, data centers, housing.
